turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. I want to add my newborn to my health policy and also check if delivery charges at your clinic can be claimed.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Congratulations on your newborn! Adding a newborn to your policy is done through your insurer directly — most allow it within 90 days of birth. Please contact your insurance company for that process.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay. And the delivery charges? I delivered here last week.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For delivery charges, if your policy covers maternity, you'll need the original bills, discharge summary, and your health card to file a reimbursement claim. Our billing team can provide all necessary documents.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can I pick up the documents today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, please visit our billing counter with your patient ID. Documents like discharge summary and itemised bill can be provided on the same day.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Perfect. Thank you and I'll come by today.
